title: Manufacturing Engineer - MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd!
